column1: # LZ Cryostat: linear fit to angular PDF for MC sampling

# total_gammas_per_yr: rate of gammas exiting skin (all angles)
# frac_in_fit_range: fraction of PDF integral within [u_min
#   (gammas below u_min are negligible and safely ignored)
